goal: Add ReviewLifecycle/v1 as a narrow review-mode lifecycle packet that composes existing review-state evidence into target, role, artifact lineage, unresolved-thread, coverage, and verdict metadata without becoming CI, Linear, or merge-readiness proof.

forbiddenFiles: GitHub, CodeRabbit, Linear, or CircleCI mutations
delivery-truth claim support changes except tests proving review lifecycle remains non-merge proof
raw prompt, transcript, review body, or secret persistence
changes that treat ReviewLifecycle/v1 as merge_ready, ci_green, linear_state_aligned, or review_threads_resolved proof by itself

designConstraints: ReviewLifecycle/v1 must live inside the existing review-state deep module; it must not create a second review truth subsystem.
The packet is review-mode lifecycle evidence and may orient or audit review work, but it is not closeout, merge-readiness, CI, or Linear proof by itself.
The packet must bind review target identity to repository, PR number, base ref, head ref, and head SHA.
Role and tool exposure must be compact, textual, and non-secret; raw tool payloads, raw comments, and transcripts are forbidden.
Tool exposure must classify visible, deferred, hidden, unavailable, and policy-blocked capability states without leaking raw payloads or credential material.
Artifact lineage must bind role, producer, path, head SHA, freshness, evidence use, and non-zero size before covered verdicts can pass.
Artifact lineage must distinguish independent reviewer-produced artifacts from implementation-produced or self-certified files; same-slice artifact existence alone is not proof.
Unresolved active threads, stale review mode, missing artifact lineage, or mismatched head SHA must produce blocked or unknown verdicts, not pass.
The slice must reuse existing EvidenceReceipt and ReviewStatePacket semantics wherever possible.
ReviewLifecycle/v1 must be discoverable through the runtime packet schema manifest with schema, example, and semantic validator pointers.
acceptanceCriteria: ReviewLifecyclePacket has schemaVersion review-lifecycle/v1 and records generatedAt, target, mode, reviewer, toolExposure, artifactLineage, findings, selectableComments, unresolvedThreads, coverage, verdict, and sourceReviewStateRef.
Validation accepts a current covered review lifecycle fixture with matching review-state head SHA, current claim-support reviewer artifacts, resolved threads, and pass verdict.
Validation rejects or blocks stale review mode, unresolved active threads, missing artifact lineage, zero-byte artifacts, orientation-only artifact receipts, producer mismatch, and head-SHA mismatch.

Validation rejects implementation-produced or self-certified reviewer artifacts even when path, size, and head SHA appear valid unless the lineage carries an independent reviewer producer and run-manifest reference.
Validation records toolExposure class counts for visible, deferred, hidden, unavailable, and policy-blocked capability states.
Validation rejects raw comment body fields, raw transcript fields, secret-like keys, and unknown top-level fields.
The runtime packet schema manifest includes review-lifecycle/v1 with schema and example validation plus semantic validation when JSON Schema cannot express cross-field rules.

ReviewLifecycle/v1 remains orientation/audit-trail evidence and does not alter pr-closeout, delivery-truth, harness next, or merge-ready behavior in this slice; a pass ReviewLifecycle fixture must not satisfy merge, CI, Linear, or review-thread-resolved claims without their separate evidence lanes.
Operator-facing failure messages include textual status and blocker classes, not color-only or boolean-only output.
validationPlan: pnpm exec biome check .harness/intent/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit-pu-033-spg-007-review-lifecycle-intent.json src/lib/review-state contracts/review-lifecycle.schema.json contracts/examples/review-lifecycle.example.json contracts/runtime-packet-schemas.manifest.json scripts/validate-review-lifecycle.cjs scripts/validate-runtime-packet-schemas.cjs src/dev/validate-runtime-packet-schemas-script.test.ts
rollbackPlan: Remove ReviewLifecycle/v1 schema, example, validator, types, builder, validation, and tests.
Remove review-lifecycle/v1 from the runtime packet schema manifest.
Preserve existing review-state/v1 and delivery-truth behavior unchanged.
currentStateNotes: Repository preflight passed, but Local Memory daemon health is degraded because the helper runner could not make http://127.0.0.1:3002/api/v1/health healthy in this sandbox.
The current branch is synced with origin at f051f308 before this intent artifact; unrelated untracked local files remain outside this slice.
PR #309 remote CI was green at the last live refresh, but merge readiness and review approval are not claimed by this slice.
stopConditions: Stop if ReviewLifecycle/v1 requires live GitHub, CodeRabbit, Linear, or CI mutation.
Stop if implementation would make review lifecycle a substitute for review-state, external-state, delivery-truth, or PR closeout claim support.
Stop if raw review bodies, prompts, transcripts, secrets, or bulky telemetry become necessary for the packet.
Stop if existing review-state validation cannot be reused without a broad rewrite.
